summary: Comprehensive frontend-only testing of Aniruddha Dharma's portfolio site. All major features verified including Hero section, Projects (4 cards with images), modals, lightbox, Experience accordion, Skills, Education, Contact form, and Navigation. Google Sheets data is loading (App Experience Revamp shows 4 screenshots vs hardcoded 3, confirming live sheet data).

ui_bugs.issue: Resume_PDF_URL is empty in Google Sheet - clicking 'Download Resume' shows a browser alert() which is poor UX. Should show a toast or disable the button instead

integration_issues.issue: Minor: When clicking the right-side next arrow in lightbox, both the X button (top-right) and next button (right-middle) share 'absolute right-4' CSS class - clicking via CSS selector can accidentally hit X. Functionally the lightbox navigation works fine via keyboard (ArrowRight/ArrowLeft/Escape). Clicking the next arrow visually works.

issues: Navigation buttons in Header (About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Education) lack data-testid attributes - reduces testability
Experience.jsx receives data={data} prop but doesn't use it (hardcoded) - prop is unused but not a visual bug

action_items: Add Resume_PDF_URL to Google Sheet so Download Resume button works (currently shows alert instead of downloading)
Consider changing alert() in Hero.jsx handleDownloadResume to use toast for better UX when resume URL is missing
Consider adding data-testid attributes to Header navigation buttons for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: Hero.jsx uses browser alert() (line 42) for missing resume URL - should use toast notification for consistent UX
MINOR: Experience.jsx, Skills.jsx, Education.jsx receive data={data} prop but are fully hardcoded - props unused (Portfolio.jsx passes data to them). Not a bug but worth noting.

MINOR: In Projects.jsx, when Google Sheets data is available, the raw data.projects from context IS already parsed by portfolioDataService.parseProjects() in PortfolioDataContext - so the data flow is correct.
MINOR: Navigation buttons in Header.jsx lack data-testid attributes - all interactive elements should have them per best practices
INFO: Contact form uses formsubmit.co - note that first submission requires email verification from formsubmit.co which may cause first submission to fail with a redirect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full frontend testing completed. App loads Google Sheets data successfully. All 4 project cards show with images, modals, and audio. Experience accordion (3 companies), Skills badges, Education (IIT Roorkee + IIM Bangalore), Contact form all working. Key outstanding: Add Resume_PDF_URL to Google Sheet. Navigation has no data-testid on nav buttons. FormSubmit.co contact form may need email verification on first use.

download_resume_alert.root_cause: personalInfo.Resume_PDF_URL is empty string in Google Sheet PERSONAL_INFO tab (or fallback data)
download_resume_alert.reproduction: Click 'Download Resume' button in Hero section
download_resume_alert.mitigation: Add Resume PDF Google Drive URL to Google Sheet PERSONAL_INFO tab under Resume_PDF_URL column, OR replace alert() with toast in Hero.jsx handleDownloadResume
